Add these DNS records in Cloudflare Dashboard > shopa.pro > DNS > Records:

1. MX  shopa.pro  ->  route3.mx.cloudflare.net  Priority: 46
2. MX  shopa.pro  ->  route1.mx.cloudflare.net  Priority: 92
3. MX  shopa.pro  ->  route2.mx.cloudflare.net  Priority: 95
4. TXT shopa.pro  ->  v=spf1 include:_spf.mx.cloudflare.net ~all
5. TXT cf2024-1._domainkey.shopa.pro  ->  v=DKIM1; h=sha256; k=rsa; 

Then enable Email Routing: Cloudflare Dashboard > shopa.pro > Email > Email Routing > Enable
